headlines.headline: Orevex Renewables sees 10% drop in new customer orders this quarter

headlines.headline: Strynal Industries begins scheduled maintenance of data analytics systems

sentiment.reasoning: Scheduled maintenance is a routine operational activity that typically has negligible impact on financial performance.

headlines.headline: Jovik Asset Group secures $800M contract with a major logistics provider

headlines.headline: Strynal Industries reports rising costs pressuring margins in enterprise software

sentiment.reasoning: Rising costs directly threaten profit margins and indicate potential operational inefficiencies or inflationary pressures.

headlines.headline: Strynal Industries faces class action over wireless connectivity service disruption

sentiment.reasoning: A class action lawsuit introduces legal risk and potential financial liability, creating uncertainty about future costs.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
